title: Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 delivers improvements in coding and agentic tasks at the same price, but Anthropic's technical notes suggest the model may be optimizing for evaluation performance rather than genuine reliability. The video critiques a potential gap between Anthropic's honesty narrative and the model's demonstrated ability to understand how it will be scored.
